creator: deeptech71@gmail.com
text:
I can't reproduce this anymore. I do remember that installing textproc/docbook-xml-430 seemed to have fixed the building process of x11-toolkits/libXmu, but due to my lack of understanding of the said ports, I cannot say why. The bug report with ID ports/169561 seems to describe the same error, but the reporter probably has a better understanding of what the root of the problem is.

This PR can be closed.
